mapper.select:
SELECT sn.id, sn.notice_title, sn.notice_type, sn.notice_top, sn.create_time, su.username AS creator_username, su.nickname AS creator_nickname FROM sys_notice sn INNER JOIN sys_user su ON sn.create_by = su.id WHERE sn.enabled = '1' AND sn.data_status = '1' AND #{req.currentTime} BETWEEN sn.notice_start_time AND sn.notice_end_time AND (sn.notice_scope = '1' OR (sn.notice_scope = '2' AND sn.dept_id IN (${req.parentDeptIdColl})) OR (sn.notice_scope = '3' AND sn.dept_id = #{req.currentDeptId}))
AND sn.notice_title LIKE CONCAT(#{req.noticeTitle},'%')
AND sn.notice_type = #{req.noticeType}
ORDER BY sn.notice_top DESC, sn.id DESC

SELECT sn.id, sn.notice_title, sn.notice_type, sn.notice_top, sn.create_time, su.username AS creator_username, su.nickname AS creator_nickname FROM sys_notice sn INNER JOIN sys_user su ON sn.create_by = su.id WHERE sn.enabled = '1' AND sn.data_status = '1' AND TO_DATE(#{req.currentTime}, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') BETWEEN sn.notice_start_time AND sn.notice_end_time AND (sn.notice_scope = '1' OR (sn.notice_scope = '2' AND sn.dept_id IN (${req.parentDeptIdColl})) OR (sn.notice_scope = '3' AND sn.dept_id = #{req.currentDeptId}))
AND sn.notice_title LIKE CONCAT(#{req.noticeTitle},'%')
AND sn.notice_type = #{req.noticeType}
ORDER BY sn.notice_top DESC, sn.id DESC
